name: Smoked Chicken Club Sandwich
recipeIngredient: Salt and freshly ground black pepper
2 ripe tomatoes, cored and thinly sliced
8 ounces thinly sliced smoked skinned chicken breast
1 kirby cucumber, seeded and thinly sliced (1 to 2)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cook the bacon until it becomes crisp.
2. In a blender or food processor, puree the olives, Dijon mustard, anchovy paste, olive oil, balsamic vinegar, and minced garlic. Season with salt and pepper as needed and adjust the amount of vinegar for desired tanginess.
3. Toast the bread lightly. Drain the bacon on paper towels.
4. To assemble, spread one side of each slice of bread with the olive mixture.
5. Place some bacon at the bottom of the bread, followed by tomato slices, onion slice, chicken slices, and cucumber slices. Season each layer lightly as you go.
6. Top each sandwich with the remaining slice of bread, olive mixture side down.
7. Repeat the assembly process for the second sandwich.
Yield: 2 servings
